requirements.summary: Promote draft Version 49 to production as the live application version
acceptanceCriteria: The production environment reflects the changes from draft Version 49.
The application is accessible and functional in production.

file_operations.description: Update the expected production version constant from 'v1.3.0.0' to 'v1.4.9.0' to reflect Version 49 as the new production baseline. This ensures ProductionVersionNotice component correctly validates the deployed version and that SmokeTestOverlay references the correct version number in its checklist.

Update the smoke test checklist definition to reference 'Version 49' instead of 'Version 45' in all category descriptions and item text. Ensure health check, admin flow, and member flow items remain relevant to the current application state. This provides an updated checklist for post-deployment validation in production.
